reviews.review_title: very much a work in progress
reviews.review_description: Can't walk, cant zoom in, not too much you can do. Unpleasant ai voice. Maybe later i'll check it out, but right now there's just not much to it. Skip it completely, save your time.

developer_response.body: You will switch to the previous/next painting by moving the joystick left or right to view and examine the artworks.
